headline: Walmart Settlement Raises Questions On Gig Driver Costs And Investor Outlook
summary: Walmart, ticker NasdaqGS:WMT, agreed to a US$100 million settlement with the FTC and 11 states over Spark Driver payment practices. Regulators alleged that Walmart misled some gig drivers about their pay and certain fees tied to deliveries. The agreement requires Walmart to adopt new transparency measures, including clearer earnings disclosures and an earnings verification program for Spark drivers. Walmart will be subject to long term regulatory oversight related to these practices as part...
